title: Factory workout apparatus
abstract: The present disclosure provides novel exercise apparatuses and methods of using the same.
claims: 1. An exercise apparatus comprising: a central body comprising a base; a plurality tubes, wherein each tube comprises an upper opening and lower opening; and one or more weighted objects, enabling a user to lift a weighted object from a lower opening of one of the tubes and depositing in the upper opening of one of the tubes such the object slides to a lower opening in of one of the tubes, wherein at least two tubes of the plurality intersect one another between their respective upper and lower openings.
